text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
WOOHOOOOO! The Fan Fest is here! LEEET'S
GOOO!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This is the day of sweet forbidden reversals,
where rules are tossed out! Today, Umamusume
support the fans, like me! I don't know if my heart
—Gwafassdfh!
choice_data_list: Now hold on just a second!
Now hold on just a second!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What is it? I'm pretty busy today...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Um... Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaat?! No one told me that! But I wanna
forget about the Twinkle Series for a day and
enjoy myself as a simple fan...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Who could possibly benefit from seeing me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I drag a griping Agnes Digital to the autograph
booth.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (Th-there's quite a few people in my line too... Wh-wh-what kind of weirdos are they?)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe they've mistaken my line for someone
else's? Like, I don't have a drop of anything like
Creek's motherly charm in me, no matter how
hard you squeeze...)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (Agh, the first person in line is coming this way!)

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Digi! I'm a big fan!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But... why?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Um. I mean. Thank you so kindly...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I don't really have any new publications to
distribute, but If you'd like to, I'd love to chat
with you about Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As these interactions continue, Agnes Digital
gradually grows more comfortable talking with
her fans.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Here's the autograph and message,
sent to your @!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll also throw in a copy of "Bottle Passed from
Turf to Dirt" as a little extra. I had leftover stock,
so I figured I'd take the Fan Fest as an opporunity
to share it...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, thank you! I'm so glad I came today! I like
you more and more every second!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
To think even a shoddy excuse for an oshi like me
has fans watching...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I g-guess so. I'm always on the other side of the
table, which is why...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I get it! I understand the fan's feelings far
better than the feelings of those who receive their
praise!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So if I put myself in their shoes, it's easy to
imagine the responses they want to hear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Agnes Digital has a firm hold on what it
takes to make her fans happy.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's keep this up! I don't want anyone
leaving disappointed because there wasn't
enough time for their turn.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In fact, when it comes to my fans, I don't know
the meaning of the word "disappoint"!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Digital spends the whole day
working herself ragged for her fans.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. When you really look at it, there's a lot of
room for improvement at this event.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With just a few adjustments, we could make
things better for both the fans and the
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nyehehe. Hey... Once the autograph session is
over, can we go around and make some quick
edits?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Just gimme your permission, and I'll show you
exactly how passionate a promoter I can be.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Woohoo! I knew you'd get it. You understand how
the fans feel! Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, as soon as the autograph event is over,
Agnes Digital starts taking control of things.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Why don't we make a separate area
for this game? That way, there's no danger of
anyone getting accidentally hit and injured.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Once the game is finished, we should make some time for photos. I know I'd want a pic for my lock screen if it was me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the Fan Fest improves right before my
eyes.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Today was truly a spectacular success—almost as
if there was some figure working in the shadows.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That was Agnes Digital. Apparently, she followed
all of the rules to a T and was still able to
incorporate so much detail...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Digital! Not half bad! We really killed it
today, thanks to you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Those cute little extras you
suggested for the cafe and food stalls were a
huge hit! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: It was totally buono! Thank you, Digital! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
H-h-huuuh? You're all too kind... I just did what I
could...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's Digital for ya! She made so many changes,
yet we didn't have a single problem!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Today, Digital is the real hero! Let's toss her in
the air! Everyone, get in formation!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait, what's going on?! Everyone? All at once?!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Hip, hip, hooray!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaat is happening heeeeere?! Are you all
goddesseees?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Agnes Digital has become a runner with
fans inside of Tracen Academy as well.
